message:
chore(workspace): update workspace member name and license-file references

Update the root Cargo.toml workspace members list to reference the
renamed `doctor_frankentui` crate (was `doctor_franktentui`).

Switch all 18 sub-crate Cargo.toml files from `license = "MIT"` to
`license-file = "../../LICENSE"` to properly reference the updated
LICENSE file which now includes the OpenAI/Anthropic rider. This ensures
crates.io metadata and cargo-deny audits correctly reflect the actual
license terms.

Affected crates: ftui, ftui-backend, ftui-core, ftui-demo-showcase,
ftui-extras, ftui-harness, ftui-i18n, ftui-layout, ftui-pty,
ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-showcase-wasm, ftui-simd, ftui-style,
ftui-text, ftui-tty, ftui-web, ftui-widgets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
